ddls:
CREATE TABLE "fish_species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fish species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the fish species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the fish species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fish species */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Description of the natural habitat of the fish species */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Description of the diet of the fish species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the fish species */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the fish species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fish species being measured */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the fish specimen in grams */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the fish specimen in centimeters */,
  "diagonal" REAL /* Diagonal measurement of the fish specimen in centimeters */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the fish specimen in centimeters */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the fish specimen in centimeters */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who took the measurement */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the measurement was taken */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES fish_species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliated with the researcher */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the researcher */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researchers_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements_over_time" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fish species being measured */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of measurement */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the fish specimen in grams */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the fish specimen in centimeters */,
  "diagonal" REAL /* Diagonal measurement of the fish specimen in centimeters */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the fish specimen in centimeters */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the fish specimen in centimeters */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who took the measurement */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the measurement was taken */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_over_time_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES fish_species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_over_time_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* Funding sources for the research */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mention */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher mentioned */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the publication (e.g., author, co-author) */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the researcher in the list of authors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_mentions_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_mentions_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher making the request */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species requested */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, denied) */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the data request */,
  "justification" TEXT /* Justification for the data request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES fish_species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the request being accessed */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in minutes */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES data_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
